intended_use: Genius AI Detection is a computer-aided detection and diagnosis (CADe/CADx) software device intended to be used with compatible digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) systems to identify and mark regions
intended_use_full: Genius AI Detection is a computer-aided detection and diagnosis (CADe/CADx) software device intended to be used with compatible digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) systems to identify and mark regions of interest including soft tissue densities (masses, architectural distortions and asymmetries) and calcifications in DBT exams from compatible DBT systems and provide confidence scores that offer assessment for Certainty of Findings and a Case Score. The device intends to aid in the interpretation of digital breast tomosynthesis exams in a concurrent fashion, where the interpreting physician confirms or dismisses the findings during the reading of the exam.
target_condition: Lesions suspicious for cancer in digital breast tomosynthesis exams (soft tissue densities, architectural distortions, asymmetries, and calcifications)
ground_truth: Histopathology (implied from cancer vs. non-cancer case classification)
other_metrics: Average observed AUC without CAD: 0.794; Difference in AUC with CAD: +0.031 (95% CI: 0.012, 0.051); Sensitivity without CAD: 66.8%; Difference in sensitivity: +9.0% (99% CI: 6.0%, 12.1%); Recall rate for non-cancer cases with CAD: 25.8%; Recall rate without CAD: 23.4%; Difference in recall rate: +2.4% (99% CI: 0.7%, 4.2%); Average case read-time with CAD: 52.0s; Average read-time without CAD: 46.3s; Difference in read-time: 5.7s (95% CI: 4.9s to 6.4s)
